a1ClaimsToRefine.explanation: Quote bundles Allied Health Rotations, Nurse Scholars, Observer Programs, Summer Youth, Teen Academic Year, and Pediatric Audiology Externship into one OFFERS_OBSERVERSHIP claim. These are distinct programs with different audiences; the navigation slug alone does not support an observership offer.

Quote 'Undergraduate Medical Education (UME)' is a section header, not a research opportunity. Lane RESEARCH_OPPORTUNITY and claimType OFFERS_RESEARCH are mismatched; this is at most a UME-presence signal.

Statement about 'medical school rotations throughout most of the departments' does not specify whether visiting/external students are accepted. Visibility CAUTION_SAFE_INTERNAL_REVIEW is appropriate; do not promote without subpage confirmation.

Page mentions 'Allied Health Rotations' without specifying medical-student vs. allied-health scope.
Page mentions 'Pediatric Audiology Externship' without indicating physician-trainee applicability.
Page mentions 'Global Health: International Patients' under patient resources, not clearly tied to observership eligibility for international physicians.
Page mentions 'Pediatric Human Patient Simulation Program' and 'Simulation Lab' without stating whether external learners may access.

Verify c2 is not promoted to PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE — quote is a multi-program navigation list, not a program statement.
